<case app="GenCase" date="2023-10-15">
  <casedef>
    <constantsdef>
      <lattice bound="1" fluid="1" />
      <gravity x="0" y="0" z="-9.81" />
    </constantsdef>
    <geometry>
      <definition dp="0.02" units_comment="metres">
        <pointmin x="-1.5" y="-0.5" z="-0.5" />
        <pointmax x="1.5" y="0.5" z="0.5" />
      </definition>
      <commands>
        <mainlist>
          <setshapemode>actual</setshapemode>
          <setdrawmode mode="full" />
          <setmkbound mk="0" />
          <drawbox>
            <boxfill>solid</boxfill>
            <point x="0" y="0" z="0" />
            <size x="3" y="1" z="1" />
          </drawbox>
          <setmkfluid mk="0" />
          <drawbox>
            <boxfill>solid</boxfill>
            <point x="0" y="0" z="0" />
            <size x="3" y="1" z="0.25" />
          </drawbox>
        </mainlist>
      </commands>
    </geometry>
    <motion>
      <objreal ref="0">
        <begin mov="1" start="0" />
        <mvrotsinu id="1" duration="9.0909" next="0">
          <freq x="0.55" y="0" z="0" />
          <ampl x="0.05236" y="0" z="0" />
        </mvrotsinu>
      </objreal>
    </motion>
  </casedef>
  <execution>
    <parameters>
      <parameter key="SavePosDouble" value="0" />
      <parameter key="Boundary" value="2" />
      <parameter key="StepAlgorithm" value="2" />
      <parameter key="VerletSteps" value="40" />
      <parameter key="Kernel" value="2" />
      <parameter key="ViscoTreatment" value="1" />
      <parameter key="ViscoCoeff" value="0.001" />
      <parameter key="TimeStep" value="0.001" />
      <parameter key="MaxIter" value="100" />
      <parameter key="Tolerance" value="1e-6" />
    </parameters>
  </execution>
</case>
